principle: Folders are for human custody and deterministic routing; tags/facets are for meaning, retrieval, privacy, review, and output use.

canonical_folders.purpose: One-page role cards, runbooks, system overview, taxonomy version notes, escalation instructions.
Bylaws, policies, surveys, minutes/agendas, officer roles, elections, board decisions.
Treasurer reports, budgets, donations, receipts, PayPal/Zeffy exports, reserve/endowment material.
Rosters, yearbooks as member authority, officer/service roles, senior/inactive status, nominations.
Dental mission, Senior Smiles, scholarships, Atwood House, SVVSD, Dental Aid, VCP, Rotary and other partners.
Annual Spring Tea, Annual Meeting, Christmas party, luncheons, museum event logistics and materials.
Scrapbooks, scans, photos, yearbook source images, transcriptions, history book source material, provenance records.
Templates, letters, invitations, thank-yous, condolence/get-well/milestone language, website copy.
Silver inventory, supplies, insurance applications/quotes, storage lists, QR codes, operational checklists.
125th anniversary committees, documentary, cookbook, garden collaboration, special Tea, public timeline, fact bank.
Universal intake and review hold for uncertain, duplicate, private, or unmapped items.
Machine exports, manifests, classification reports, review logs, migrations, backups.

primary_tags.definition: Operating instructions, role cards, project briefs, taxonomy docs, Verdify handoff material.
Bylaws, standing rules, policy audit, survey results, officer/election/member-status governance.
Minutes, agendas, meeting packets, vote notes, agenda-only best-available evidence.
primary_tags.auto_route: only if date and record type are clear

primary_tags.definition: Treasurer reports, budgets, account balances, endowment/memorial/Raymond James/LCF material.
PayPal/Zeffy/Giving Fund exports, donation lists, receipts, giving campaigns, donor stewardship.
Yearbook-first member authority, rosters, senior/inactive/active status, nominations, officer and committee lists.
Children/student/veteran/low-income dental care, screenings, school clinics, Dental Aid references.
Senior dental program, senior dental support, Dental Aid senior-related material.
Dental career scholarships, scholarship applications, awards, recipients, criteria.
Atwood House, EFAA, Veterans Community Project, Rotary, SVVSD, Longmont Museum, First Congregational, other partners.
primary_tags.auto_route: ok when no private recipient data

primary_tags.definition: Tea invitations, guest lists, sales, programs, house logistics, silver, bake sale, attendance and event photos.
Christmas parties, luncheons, annual meeting when event-focused, museum event logistics not tied to 125th project management.
Historical records that do not belong more specifically to scrapbooks, photos, yearbooks, press, or publications.
Scrapbook scans, page images, page inventories, processed scrapbook outputs.
Standalone photos, extracted scrapbook photos, event photos, website/photo archive material.
primary_tags.auto_route: use upload year only if captured year missing

primary_tags.definition: Newspaper clippings, programs, booklets, history book drafts, public-facing historical summaries.
Reusable correspondence templates, style guide, thank-yous, invitations, condolence/get-well/milestone text.
primary_tags.auto_route: ok for templates; review personal letters

primary_tags.definition: Silver, supplies, storage, QR codes, checklists, physical archive inventory, non-finance operational assets.
Insurance applications/quotes/policies, IRS/501(c)(3), EIN, risk notes, compliance docs.
Overall 125th planning, committee materials, project tracker, budget, milestone timeline, public communications calendar.
primary_tags.auto_route: ok when clearly anniversary project management

primary_tags.definition: Cookbook reissue, recipes, Morris Publishing, recipe scans, cookbook committee handoff and budget.
primary_tags.auto_route: review member/family recipe rights if public

primary_tags.definition: Innovation Center documentary, interview lists, footage, release status, screening logistics.
primary_tags.auto_route: needs release/privacy review for people footage

primary_tags.definition: Central Elementary garden collaboration, dedication, naming ideas, Kerri Burks coordination, PTO overlap.
Website backup, public graphics, logos, flyers, public donation materials, approved public copy.
primary_tags.auto_route: public assets ok; links/QRs require review

primary_tags.definition: Manifests, classification reports, review exports, migration logs, generated structured datasets.

record_types.definition: Image of people, events, places, documents, objects, or website graphics.
record_types.notes: Use visual/OCR workflow; extract people/date/source; default to privacy review for living people or students.

record_types.definition: Full scrapbook page or extracted page image.
record_types.notes: Preserve page number, volume, source collection, and full-page image as original evidence.

record_types.definition: Yearbook page/image or yearbook-derived file.
record_types.notes: Yearbook-first member authority; capture member, officer, committee, and role facts.

record_types.definition: Formal minutes or transcribed minutes.
record_types.notes: Use for official actions, votes, reports, program decisions; source-cite facts.

record_types.definition: Meeting agenda or agenda-only best-available record.
record_types.notes: Do not treat as minutes unless no minutes exist; mark agenda-only when relevant.

record_types.definition: Budget, balance, report, account statement, reserve/endowment material.
record_types.notes: Treasurer-only or board-only until reviewed.

record_types.definition: PayPal/Zeffy/check/cash donor export or receipt request.
record_types.notes: Donor-sensitive; exclude from normal search/chat.

record_types.definition: Invitation, RSVP, program, sign-up, bake-sale sheet, event logistics.
record_types.notes: Route by event and year; capture donor/contact privacy.

record_types.definition: Bylaw, survey, policy, role definition, election/nomination material.
record_types.notes: Board review; track version/draft/final status.

record_types.definition: Roster, member status, officer list, committee list, member bio.
record_types.notes: Member-private unless historically public and reviewed.

record_types.definition: Newspaper/magazine/web article or clipping.
record_types.notes: Capture publication, date, OCR confidence, copyright/publication status.

record_types.definition: Canva/slides/deck/workbook for Rotary, museum, anniversary, board.
record_types.notes: Capture output usage and source evidence status.

record_types.definition: Physical asset or archive inventory.
record_types.notes: Capture physical location, custodian, last verified date.

record_types.definition: Cookbook, history book, program booklet, public brochure.
record_types.notes: Capture version and publication rights/review status.

record_types.definition: AI or human synthesis, house history, fact bank, narrative draft.
record_types.notes: Must point back to source citations before public use.

record_types.definition: Insurance, compliance, IRS/EIN, risk docs.
record_types.notes: Restricted; board review.

record_types.definition: Draft/sent email, thank-you, condolence, committee handoff, board communication.
record_types.notes: Capture author voice/template vs personal communication.

record_types.definition: Logo, website screenshot, QR code, public flyer, website backup item.
record_types.notes: Review active links and public safety before publication.

record_types.definition: Workbook/tracker/database export structured around records.
record_types.notes: Preserve schema/tab notes and source confidence.

record_types.definition: Operating instructions, SOP, one-page role card, handoff.
record_types.notes: Keep current version in readme/runbooks folder.

functions.definition: Decision rules, bylaws, elections, surveys, policy audit, officer roles.

Rotary presentation, press, public speaking, museum/story outputs.

privacy_access.definition: Approved public history, website assets, flyers, public event materials.
privacy_access.routing_note: Can appear in public search/chat after review.

privacy_access.definition: Routine internal club records and historical archive materials.
privacy_access.routing_note: Visible to active internal users; not public by default.

privacy_access.definition: Governance disputes, policy drafts, board deliberation, sensitive planning.
privacy_access.routing_note: Exclude from general member search unless approved.

privacy_access.definition: Financial account detail, treasurer reports, reconciliation, donor/payment operational records.
Donor names, addresses, amounts, receipts, stewardship notes.
privacy_access.routing_note: Exclude from normal chat/search; allow aggregate reporting only.

privacy_access.definition: Member contact info, private status, life-event communications, nominations.
privacy_access.routing_note: Protect contact details and personal notes.

privacy_access.definition: Students, seniors, veterans, scholarship applicants, dental recipients.
privacy_access.routing_note: Strictest privacy; no public use unless sanitized.

privacy_access.definition: Items flagged for return to family or involving family provenance rights.
privacy_access.routing_note: Historian review before publishing or moving.

privacy_access.definition: Logs, manifests, credentials references, migrations, classification reports.
Unknown or mixed sensitivity until reviewed.

processing_statuses.definition: Physical item exists; no usable scan/photo yet.
Digital image exists; text/facts not extracted.
Possible exact/near duplicate or newer version.
People in image/text need identification or disambiguation.
AI/human summary needs source citation before public use.
Safe to import/move once action approved.
Approved/sanitized for website, deck, program, history book, etc.
Final record; no current action expected.

usage_tags.definition: Should be discoverable in internal Drive/search.
Allowed as source for chat at its privacy level.
Useful for Rotary or public presentation.
Useful for role handoff or Verdify template.

reviewer_roles.definition: Historical people, dates, events, provenance, archive classifications.
Donation, receipt, budget, account, reserve/endowment records.
Governance, policy, insurance, board-level sensitive items.
Member contact info, correspondence templates, personal letters.
Annual Tea materials, silver, supplies, guest/event workflows.
Physical archive provenance, museum-scan candidates, family-return questions.
Taxonomy mapping, system migrations, classifier review, logs.

retrieval_questions.question: Find all materials about the Dental Program before 1950.
Find all references to Senior Smiles.
Find all documents related to the Stuart Family funds.
retrieval_questions.taxonomy_test: Stuart Funds Policy + finance/governance + board privacy

retrieval_questions.question: Find all usable photos for the Rotary deck.
retrieval_questions.taxonomy_test: usage rotary_presentation + photo + ready_for_publication/public or club_internal reviewed

retrieval_questions.question: Find all Tea attendance figures by decade.
retrieval_questions.taxonomy_test: Annual Spring Tea + extracted metric attendance + decade

retrieval_questions.question: Find all members from families with multi-generation Sunshine involvement.
Find all items that mention Longmont Rotary.
retrieval_questions.taxonomy_test: organization Longmont Rotary + related documents across history/programs

retrieval_questions.question: Find all files that need human review before publication.
Find all donor records that should not be visible to general members.
Find all yearbook-derived facts for a named officer/member.
Find all agenda-only records where minutes are still missing.
retrieval_questions.taxonomy_test: record_type agenda + status agenda-only/open minutes gap

retrieval_questions.question: Find all source files for the history book fact bank.
Find all physical archive items that still need digitization.
retrieval_questions.taxonomy_test: source Black Chest Archive/Museum Scan Candidate + processing not_digitized

retrieval_questions.question: Find all restricted scholarship or dental-recipient records.

james_backlog.title: Add a taxonomy seed import
james_backlog.detail: Create a seed loader for the workbook/JSON so James does not hand-create every tag/folder mapping in the UI.

james_backlog.title: Add tag facets
james_backlog.detail: Current tags only have primary/secondary. Add facet/tag_group so record_type, program, source_collection, privacy, usage, reviewer_role do not collapse into one flat tag pile.

james_backlog.title: Keep one primary routing tag but many secondary facets
james_backlog.detail: Primary tag answers where the item routes. Secondary facets answer what it is about, who appears, source collection, privacy, status, and output usage.

james_backlog.title: Add privacy/access as first-class metadata
james_backlog.detail: Do not rely only on tags for privacy. Restricted/donor/beneficiary records must be excluded from normal search/chat by policy.

james_backlog.title: Add date confidence fields
james_backlog.detail: Store exact date, year, decade/date range, and date_confidence. Archives need approximate/inferred/unknown dates without pretending they are exact.

james_backlog.title: Add provenance/source collection fields
james_backlog.detail: Every item needs source_collection, original_source_path/id, intake batch, checksum, and notes. Do not lose physical/archive provenance during NAS staging.

james_backlog.title: Add entity model or entity-mention tables
james_backlog.detail: People, families, organizations, roles, program metrics, scholarships, donations, dental services, events, and source citations need structure beyond document tags.

james_backlog.title: Expand review task types
james_backlog.detail: Add privacy_review, date_confirmation, person_identification, source_verification, publication_approval, family_return_review.

james_backlog.title: Add reviewer role routing
james_backlog.detail: A review task should know whether Historian, Treasurer, President/board, Correspondence Secretary, Tea chair, or Verdify admin owns it.

james_backlog.title: Add acceptance tests from retrieval questions
james_backlog.detail: Test real user questions, not just health/classifier contracts: Dental before 1950, Senior Smiles, Stuart funds, Rotary photos, Tea attendance, donor restrictions.

james_backlog.title: Separate archive module from nonprofit ops
james_backlog.detail: Repo is Track A: document intelligence and Drive organization. Donor CRM, receipt automation, governance survey, and anniversary tracker need explicit Track B/C decisions.

james_backlog.title: Preserve Drive as club source of truth
james_backlog.detail: NAS sunshineclub corpus is a staging area, not the final owner. Keep originals, import/move only through reviewable actions, never delete in MVP.

james_backlog.title: Support golden sample evaluation
james_backlog.detail: Use 50-100 hand-labeled files as classifier evaluation. Track precision by primary tag and by sensitive/privacy tags.

james_backlog.title: Use project tag not hard-coded date
james_backlog.detail: Use 125th Anniversary as a project tag even if the club later revises the official anniversary year/date convention.
